narration: Science has a clearer story about mirages than social media does.
visual_description: Hook visual: Science has a clearer story about mirages than social media does.

narration: Ever seen water on a hot road? That’s a mirage, but it’s not what it seems.
visual_description: Context visual: Ever seen water on a hot road? That’s a mirage, but it’s not what it seems.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: Ever seen water on a hot road? That’s a mirage, but it’s not what it seems.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: Ever seen water on a hot road? That’s a mirage, but it’s not what it seems.

narration: Mirages happen due to light bending through layers of air with different temperatures.
visual_description: Escalation visual: Mirages happen due to light bending through layers of air with different temperatures.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: Mirages happen due to light bending through layers of air with different temperatures.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: Mirages happen due to light bending through layers of air with different temperatures.

narration: That’s called refraction! It tricks our brains into seeing things that aren’t really there.
visual_description: Evidence visual: That’s called refraction! It tricks our brains into seeing things that aren’t really there.
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: That’s called refraction! It tricks our brains into seeing things that aren’t really there.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: That’s called refraction! It tricks our brains into seeing things that aren’t really there.

narration: So when you think you see water, it’s actually an illusion shaped by the heat.
